message:
feat(runtime): Add BuildList opcode for eval() list literal support

- Add BuildList opcode to compile.zig VM to build lists from stack items
- Update expr_parser.zig to emit BuildList instead of placeholder Call
- Fix allocator mismatch in PyList: create() and append() now both use
  c_allocator for item array to prevent double-free crashes

Fixes test_longexp which uses eval("[" + "2," * 65580 + "]")
